# vendor/skills-sh — skills.sh Skill Catalog Mirror

## What is skills.sh?

[skills.sh](https://www.skills.sh/) is an open ecosystem marketplace for reusable AI agent skills — analogous to npm for packages or the VS Code extension marketplace, but for Claude Code and other AI coding agents. It aggregates skills from public GitHub repositories and provides a unified discovery surface with install counts, categories, and CLI-based installation.

As of June 2026, skills.sh indexes 674,000+ total installs across skills from publishers including Anthropic, Vercel Labs, Microsoft, Lark/Feishu, and hundreds of community contributors. It supports 20+ agents: Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, GitHub Copilot, Windsurf, Gemini CLI, and more.

## What are Claude Code Skills?

Skills are reusable prompts and workflows packaged as markdown files. When installed, they live at `~/.claude/skills/<skill-name>/SKILL.md` (user scope) or `.claude/skills/<skill-name>/SKILL.md` (project scope). Claude Code reads them automatically and uses trigger conditions in the skill's description to decide when to activate a skill.

Skills define:
- **Trigger conditions** — when the skill activates (encoded in the description field)
- **Workflow instructions** — step-by-step guidance Claude follows
- **Resource references** — links to vendor docs, templates, code snippets

## How to install skills

Via the skills CLI:

```bash
npx skills add anthropics/skills          # install all Anthropic skills
npx skills add anthropics/skills/pdf      # install a single skill
```

Via Claude Code plugin browser:

```
/plugin                          # open plugin browser
# navigate to Discover tab, find skill, press Enter
```

Skills install as SKILL.md files that Claude Code reads on startup. No runtime binary is required.

## This vendor directory

This directory contains a crawled snapshot of Anthropic-published skills from skills.sh. It was generated by fetching:

- `https://www.skills.sh/anthropics` — skills.sh listing for the `anthropics` publisher
- `https://www.skills.sh/anthropics/skills` — individual skill listing for `anthropics/skills`
- `https://github.com/anthropics/skills` — source repository with 18 skills
- `https://github.com/anthropics/claude-plugins-official` — official plugin repository with 33 skills
- Individual `SKILL.md` files fetched from raw.githubusercontent.com for description extraction

## Sources covered

| Repository | Skills | Total Installs | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| `anthropics/skills` | 18 | ~1.9M | Primary skill library |
| `anthropics/claude-plugins-official` | 33 | ~65.2K | Official plugin collection |

## Schema reference

`anthropics/sources.json` is a JSON array where each element has:

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `id` | `string` | Stable identifier: `<owner>/<repo>/<skill-name>` |
| `name` | `string` | Skill name (matches directory name in source repo) |
| `description` | `string` | Trigger + purpose description from SKILL.md |
| `category` | `string` | Functional category (Document Tools, Development Tools, etc.) |
| `author` | `string` | GitHub org or user (publisher) |
| `version` | `string` | Version string or `"latest"` if not versioned |
| `source_url` | `string` | GitHub tree URL for the skill directory |
| `install_count` | `number \| null` | Total installs reported by skills.sh at crawl time |
| `tags` | `string[]` | Keyword tags derived from skill content and metadata |

## Last crawl

- **Timestamp:** 2026-06-05T00:00:00Z
- **Skills cataloged:** 25 (18 from `anthropics/skills`, 7 from `anthropics/claude-plugins-official`)
- **Source:** https://www.skills.sh/anthropics
- **Method:** WebFetch of skills.sh listing pages + GitHub raw SKILL.md files for description extraction
